mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s.part_id, s.stock_date, s.stock_qty AS currentStock FROM storage s INNER JOIN ( SELECT part_id, MAX(stock_date) AS max_stock_date FROM storage GROUP BY part_id ) latest ON s.part_id = latest.part_id AND s.stock_date = latest.max_stock_date ) st ON st.part_id = b.part_id

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT o.part_id, COUNT(o.part_id) * b2.qty AS totalRequiredQty FROM `orders` o JOIN bom b2 ON o.part_id = b2.part_id WHERE o.part_id IS NOT NULL AND o.order_status != 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY o.part_id, b2.qty ) od ON od.part_id = b.part_id

b.part_id AS materialId, b.part_name AS name, IFNULL(st.currentStock, 0) AS currentStock, AS demandQty, IFNULL(p.part_price, 0) AS unitPrice, GREATEST( 0, - IFNULL(st.currentStock, 0) ) AS requiredStock, CASE WHEN ( - IFNULL(st.currentStock, 0) ) > 0 THEN 'shortage' ELSE 'normal' END AS status, GREATEST( 0, - IFNULL(st.currentStock, 0) ) * IFNULL(p.part_price, 0) AS additionalPurchaseCost
mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY b.part_id ASC) AS id,
FROM bom b LEFT JOIN price p ON p.part_id = b.part_id
ORDER BY b.part_id ASC

SELECT 0 AS id,
FROM bom b LEFT JOIN price p ON p.part_id = b.part_id
WHERE b.part_id = #{materialId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY h.stock_date DESC, h.part_id ASC) AS id, DATE_FORMAT(h.stock_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, DATE_FORMAT(h.stock_date, '%H:%i') AS time, h.part_id AS materialId, b.part_name AS materialName, CASE WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'INBOUND' THEN 'in' WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 'out' WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN 'adjust' WHEN COALESCE(h.stock_qty - h.prev_stock_qty, h.stock_qty) > 0 THEN 'in' WHEN COALESCE(h.stock_qty - h.prev_stock_qty, h.stock_qty) < 0 THEN 'out' ELSE 'adjust' END AS type, CASE WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'INBOUND' THEN 'INBOUND' WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 'OUTBOUND' WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN 'ADJUSTMENT' WHEN COALESCE(h.stock_qty - h.prev_stock_qty, h.stock_qty) > 0 THEN 'INBOUND' WHEN COALESCE(h.stock_qty - h.prev_stock_qty, h.stock_qty) < 0 THEN 'OUTBOUND' ELSE 'ADJUSTMENT' END AS typeLabel, COALESCE(h.stock_qty - h.prev_stock_qty, h.stock_qty) AS delta, h.stock_qty AS afterStock, CASE WHEN h.prev_stock_qty IS NULL THEN 'Initial stock snapshot' WHEN h.normalized_operation_type = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN 'Stock adjusted' WHEN h.stock_qty > h.prev_stock_qty THEN 'Stock replenished' WHEN h.stock_qty < h.prev_stock_qty THEN 'Stock consumed' ELSE 'Stock adjusted' END AS reason FROM ( SELECT s.part_id, s.stock_date, s.stock_qty, s.operation_type, CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.operation_type, ''))) IN ('INBOUND', 'IN') THEN 'INBOUND' WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.operation_type, ''))) IN ('OUTBOUND', 'OUT', 'USAGE') THEN 'OUTBOUND' WHEN UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.operation_type, ''))) IN ('ADJUSTMENT', 'ADJUST', 'MANUAL') THEN 'ADJUSTMENT' ELSE NULL END AS normalized_operation_type, LAG(s.stock_qty) OVER ( PARTITION BY s.part_id ORDER BY s.stock_date ) AS prev_stock_qty FROM storage s ) h JOIN bom b ON b.part_id = h.part_id ORDER BY h.stock_date DESC, h.part_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO storage ( part_id, stock_date, stock_qty, operation_type ) SELECT #{materialId}, CASE WHEN MAX(s.stock_date) IS NULL OR MAX(s.stock_date) < NOW() THEN NOW() ELSE DATE_ADD(MAX(s.stock_date), INTERVAL 1 SECOND) END, #{stockQty}, #{operationType} FROM storage s WHERE s.part_id = #{materialId}
